text:
is a member of the Military Police Brigade.

Story

Dissidence Movement arc

After Captain Gloria Bernhart and her Military Police Brigade forces succeed in breaching the gate of the Industrial City during the rebellion of the Dissidence Movement, she places Squad Leader Contzen in charge of Squads One, Two, and Three with the task of heading to the MP office in the city and eliminating the remaining rebels' main force.
